creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
MySQL 5.6 received its last update this year in February.
MySQL 5.5 has now been in the ports for 4 years and will be removed at the end of Q2.
However, I will not keep MySQL 5.6 in the ports for 4 years now.
I think end Q1 2023 will be a good time to remove MySQL 5.6 from the ports.
MySQWL 5.7 will be in the ports for a few more years.
